parameters.query: SELECT bc.location_id, bc.brand_name, bc.meta_dataset_id, bc.meta_access_token, bc.meta_ad_account_id, bc.theme_overrides FROM brand_configs bc WHERE bc.meta_ad_account_id IS NOT NULL AND bc.meta_access_token IS NOT NULL AND bc.meta_dataset_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT DISTINCT ON (t.phone) t.location_id, t.phone, t.email, t.lead_name, t.etapa_funil, t.created_at FROM n8n_schedule_tracking t WHERE t.location_id = '{{ $('Fetch Locations With Dataset').first().json.location_id }}' AND t.etapa_funil IN ('Agendou', 'Compareceu', 'Fechou') AND t.phone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.phone, t.created_at DESC

INSERT INTO meta_custom_audiences (location_id, audience_id, audience_name, lead_count, synced_at, status, response_payload) VALUES ('{{ $('Hash Lead Data SHA256').first().json.location_id }}', '{{ $('Create Meta Custom Audience').first().json.id }}', '{{ $('Hash Lead Data SHA256').first().json.audience_name }}', {{ $('Hash Lead Data SHA256').first().json.lead_count }}, NOW(), 'synced', '{{ JSON.stringify($('Add Users To Audience').first().json) }}'::TEXT) ON CONFLICT (location_id, audience_id) DO UPDATE SET lead_count = EXCLUDED.lead_count, synced_at = NOW(), status = 'synced', response_payload = EXCLUDED.response_payload
